chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 964 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.5435/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1, 2, 6 & 7. 3. For orders on CMA No.5436/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.5437/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 13.03.2025 Mr. Feisal Hussain Naqvi, advocate and Mr. Malik Muhammad Ejaz, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4 & 5. Counsel for the petitioner presses petition to the extent that the respondent No.3 may respond to the petitioner’s letter dated 17.02.2025, available at page 409 of the court file, preferably within four weeks. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, learned Assistant Attorney General, is present and waives notice and states that he has no cavil to the aforesaid and petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
